get.summary: Build and environment metadata. Requires no API key.
Returns 200 only with a valid API key. Used to verify the configured key.
Every vehicle, with the figures the garage card shows. Each is projected from that vehicle's summary, never recomputed.

post.summary: Adds a vehicle, together with its opening odometer reading.

get.summary: The stored reference facts — specs, fluids, tyre pressures, policies. The only screen that is not derived.

patch.summary: Edits the stored inputs — identity, statutory dates and the insurance policy. MOT expiry is derived and cannot be set here.

get.summary: Every derived figure for one vehicle, computed on read. Registration is matched ignoring case and spacing.
Every fill with its computed MPG, newest last. MPG is derived per fill, never stored.

post.summary: Records a fill, its odometer reading and its mirrored expense, then re-runs the integrity detectors.

delete.summary: Removes a fill and its shadows — the mileage reading and the mirrored expense go with it.

get.summary: Every service record, newest last, with the derived next-service figures.

post.summary: Records a service, its odometer reading and its mirrored expense, then re-runs the detectors.

patch.summary: Corrects a record and its shadows, then re-runs the detectors.

delete.summary: Removes a record; its mirrored reading and expense go with it.

get.summary: The seeded expense categories, in display order. The same list the write path validates against.
The integrity queue. Open flags by default; ?status=all includes resolved ones.

patch.summary: Resolves a flag as Corrected, Accepted or Dismissed, with a note.

get.summary: Every task with its derived bundle total — the cost of the jobs waiting on one garage visit.
The watchlist, worst first, with the derived worst-case cost of everything still monitored.
Pressure and tread by corner, oldest last.
The wash log, oldest last. Cadence is derived by the caller from the dates.
The kit inventory — what is owned, on order, and still to buy.
Every reading, newest first, with its origin. The odometer derives from the newest valid one.

post.summary: Records a manual reading, then re-runs the integrity detectors. A reading below the odometer is flagged, never rejected.

get.summary: Every check with its computed status. Status is never stored — it derives from the last log and the interval.

patch.summary: Edits a definition's name, cadence, interval, guidance, order or active flag.

delete.summary: Deletes a definition and its logs. Deactivating is usually what you want instead.

post.summary: Marks one or more checks done. The batch is the weekly walk-around: one action, not five.

get.summary: Every entry with the derived rollups. The running total is computed, never a column.

post.summary: Records an expense. Fuel-category entries are refused — they come from the fuel log.

patch.summary: Edits an expense. A mirrored fuel entry is not editable here — edit the fill.

delete.summary: Deletes an expense. A mirrored fuel entry is not deletable here — delete the fill.

get.summary: Targets against actuals for a period. Actuals are computed from the expenses; only the targets are stored.

put.summary: Sets the annual targets. Send the full set — this replaces them.

ApiKey.description: The value of ApiKey:Value on the server. Sent as the X-Api-Key header.
ApiKey.name: X-Api-Key
